name: mistral-models
description: Mistral AI models via its OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Bring your own Mistral API key.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Mistral AI API Key
x-meta.help: Your Mistral AI API key. Leave empty to fall back to the MISTRAL_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: A Mistral model id. Empty = resolved from live /v1/models discovery.

x-meta.label: Base URL
x-meta.help: Optional override of the Mistral AI base URL. Empty uses https://api.mistral.ai/v1.
